name: Mint Fantome's Halloween Party
description:
This bot came about from a simple question I had and a desire to turn it into a bot. So I finally found the opportunity to do just that. Love the spooky ghost being dressed as another spooky ghost.

Anyways here's some gens of the girls in the bot (Aside from Saba cause Novelai doesn't have a dataset for her yet I suppose. And Dooby's dataset seems to be too small to put her in a costume sadly):

Dokibird

Dooby

Nimi Nightmare

And a bonus Mint Fantome

Anyways gonna see if I can make at least one more halloween bot before the end of October, and if not I still wanna at least upload it. Lemme know if there's any problems with the bot and I hope you enjoy it.

Edit: Og thumbnail cause it apparently looked "underage"

Added a couple other intros cause I wanted to, with one bringing back the pumpkin painting so have fun with that.

Here's some gens based on the pumpkin stuff:

Minto Pumpkin

Nimi Pumpkin
creator: Pandapple
